name: Easter Eggs & Hidden Details
description: Hidden references, foreshadowing, and easter eggs that most people missed. Detective-like tone revealing what creators hid in plain sight for attentive viewers.

structure.hook_rule: Open with the most MIND-BLOWING hidden detail: 'There is a detail in [topic] that 99 percent of people walked right past. And once you see it, you can not unsee it.'
structure.pacing_rule: Each detail should feel like a discovery. Use 'Look closely at...', 'If you pause at exactly...', 'Notice how...'. Start with easy-to-spot details, escalate to ones that require frame-by-frame analysis.
structure.ending_rule: End with a detail that RECONTEXTUALIZES everything: 'And this one detail changes the meaning of the entire [topic].' Loop back to suggest there are even more hidden details.
structure.tone: Excited detective who just cracked a case, sharing discoveries with fellow obsessives
transitions: Nhưng đó mới chỉ là khởi đầu...
Và nếu bạn nhìn kỹ hơn...
Nhưng chi tiết này mới thực sự gây sốc...
Bạn đã bao giờ để ý...

prompt_injection: FORMAT: Easter egg reveal style. Every detail should feel like a discovery the viewer is making in real-time with you. Use phrases like 'If you look closely...', 'What most people miss is...', 'The creator actually hid...', 'Pause right here and notice...'. Build from cool details to GAME-CHANGING revelations. The viewer should want to immediately go back and rewatch or revisit the original.
example_hook_en: There is a hidden detail in [topic] that changes everything. And almost nobody caught it.
example_hook_vi: Có một chi tiết ẩn trong [topic] mà gần như không ai phát hiện. Và nó thay đổi tất cả.
